stemHtml: A turbo compressor air conditioning system (bootstrap system) includes two heat exchangers; the primary exchanger (P) and the secondary exchanger (S). The functions of these heat exchangers are as follows…

options.a: P: warms up engine bleed air S: recirculates the cabin air, reducing its temperature.
options.b: P: warms up engine bleed air S: increases the temperature of air originating from the compressor of the pack.
options.c: P: precools the engine bleed air S: cools air behind the pack's compressor.
options.d: P: pre-cools the engine bleed air S: increases the temperature of the air used for air-conditioning of cargo compartment (animals).
